summary: Pipeline Page Visual Refinements - Iteration 276. All CSS/visual changes verified: hero layout balance (gap-3), subdued stage tracker (minWidth 110px, softer colors), tighter CTA spacing (mt-3.5), stronger section headers (14px, weight 700), card borders, enhanced On Track green (#3d7a55). Both desktop and mobile viewports tested successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelineHero.js: gap-3 layout between content and stage tracker - VERIFIED (line 76)
PipelineHero.js: Stage rail minWidth 110px with subdued colors (rgba(255,255,255,0.04) border, softer dot colors) - VERIFIED (line 214)
PriorityBoard.js: Card borders via cardBorder property - VERIFIED (lines 35, 45, 55)
PriorityBoard.js: Enhanced On Track green #3d7a55 - VERIFIED (line 49)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline page visual refinements complete. All CSS changes verified: (1) Hero gap-3 layout, (2) Stage tracker subdued with minWidth 110px, (3) CTA mt-3.5 spacing, (4) Section headers 14px/700 weight, (5) Card borders via cardBorder property, (6) On Track green #3d7a55. No logic changes - purely visual. Pipeline/Priority toggle works. Mobile viewport renders correctly with stage rail hidden.

pipeline_page_loads.details: Pipeline page loads successfully after login

hero_layout_balance.details: Hero uses gap-3 layout between content and stage tracker, reducing gap

stage_tracker_subdued.details: Stage rail has minWidth 110px, softer colors (rgba(255,255,255,0.04) border), smaller dots

stage_tracker_active_stage.details: Active stage 'Talking' highlighted with #48c9a8 color and glow

signal_bullets_visible.details: 3 signal bullets with colored dots: red (Overdue), green (Coach responded), amber (Momentum)

cta_spacing.details: CTA button has mt-3.5 spacing, tighter than before

section_headers_contrast.details: 'Needs attention now (3)' and 'On track (4)' headers have 14px font, weight 700, visible counts

card_borders.details: Cards have visible borders via cardBorder property (1px solid with tier-specific colors)

on_track_green_contrast.details: On Track section uses enhanced green #3d7a55 for badge and header

card_navigation.details: All cards clickable and navigate to school detail page

mobile_viewport.details: Hero and cards render properly at 390x844, stage rail hidden (sm:flex), all elements visible
